sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الشَّبَابِ سَاعَاتٍ طَوِيلَةً أَمَامَ الشَّاشَاتِ يَوْمِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Mnogi mladi ljudi svakodnevno provode duge sate ispred ekrana.
sentences.translationEn: Many young people spend long hours in front of screens every day.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُونَ مَوَاقِعَ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ لِلْمُحَادَثَةِ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Oni koriste društvene mreže za razgovor sa svojim prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: They use social media sites to chat with their friends.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِتَقْلِيلِ هَذَا الْوَقْتِ لِلْحِفَاظِ عَلَى صِحَّةِ الْعَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari savjetuju smanjenje ovog vremena radi očuvanja zdravlja očiju.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors advise reducing this time to maintain eye health.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْمُهِمِّ مُمَارَسَةُ الرِّيَاضَةِ بَدَلًا مِنَ الْجُلُوسِ الدَّائِمِ.
sentences.translation: Važno je baviti se sportom umjesto stalnog sjedenja.
sentences.translationEn: It is important to practice sports instead of sitting all the time.
